summary: An exceptional test suite. It rigorously unit-tests the core logic (glob parsing, rule priority, deduplication, JSON loading, error handling) using standard Pester constructs. The workflow tests are masterfully separated into structural validation (parsing YAML, checking actionlint) and an elegant end-to-end act test harness. By running `act` beforehand and then asserting against the captured output, it adheres to requirements, avoids cluttering Pester's output stream, and enables robust assertions on the exact pipeline output.
